params.name: The Happy Prince
params.description:
On Sept 24, 1888 AD, the subjects of Sanssouci Palace erected a statue to commemorate the Happy Prince.
This statue was erected by the courtiers of Sanssouci in memory of their Happy Prince. He is dressed in gold leaf, his eyes are made of sapphire, and the sword in his hand is inlaid with rubies. The statue is in the city's highest place, watching over people's livelihood. After witnessing all kinds of suffering in the world, he couldn't help shedding tears, and it awoke the swallow trying t …
